THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, NANCY MILLER, STAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 130 EDDY STREET #305, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102 $995.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $995.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-05-1999, EACH PARTY SHALL OTHERWISE BEAR HIS OWN ATTY FEES AND COSTS THROUGH STIPULATION DATE. SHOULD DEFENDANT PAY THE JUDGMENT SUM BY 5:00 P.M. ON MAY 3, 1999, THEN THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL AND DEFENDANT SHALL BE ALLOWED TO STAY.
